cause: spec-judge round 1 architect FAIL: added scenarios placed under the gate-digest section while their prose sat under the edit-class section, so suite and README contradicted each other on where the rule lives; one scenario attributed a routing decision to the component the suite freezes as rendering none
fix: moved the scenarios into the structural edit-class section and reworded them to that section's convention

cause: spec-judge round 1 architect FAIL: prose asserted the delimiter is excluded from the scenario identity but no scenario could register a miss on it, so an implementation hashing the delimiter would leave every scenario green and the claim silently false
fix: froze the delimiter and media-type behavior as scenarios and gave each a mutation-verified control upstream

cause: spec-judge round 2 builder+architect FAIL: the sibling prose claim that source locations are excluded was still unfrozen (round 1's defect one sentence over), and the media-type scenario omitted the not-purely-additive face its siblings carry, leaving a half-fix that reports modified while the edit still self-clears
fix: froze the source-location exclusion with a mutation-verified control, added the missing face, and dropped an unfrozen mechanism claim

cause: spec-judge round 3 builder+architect FAIL: the identity matrix was swept on the DocString row across both faces but left the DataTable row half-done, so no scenario could register a miss on the DataTable form exclusion while the prose claimed every exclusion was frozen by its own scenario; the sweep itself had the named-site shape the prior rounds diagnosed
fix: enumerated the argument-kind by face matrix, froze the realigned-DataTable exclusion with a mutation-verified control, and restated the prose as the enumerated matrix

cause: spec-judge round 4 content gap: the prose universally claimed every form exclusion is an independent implementation choice, but the indentation row is a parser property with no field to exclude and no mutant caught by it alone
fix: scoped the universal to the three real choices and stated the indentation scenario guards a dependency property
